home.title: Recording Manager
home.description: View, play, download, delete recordings, and create meeting notes.

login.errDefault: Request failed, please try again later.
login.errEmailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please click "Resend Confirmation" and verify first.
login.errRateLimit: Too many requests, please try again later.
login.errEmailRateLimit: Email rate limit exceeded. If using Brevo, check Supabase Custom SMTP settings.
login.errCaptcha: Security check failed, please refresh and try again.
login.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.msgRegisterSuccess: Registration successful. Please verify your email before logging in.
login.msgPasswordUpdated: Password updated. Please login with your new password.

account.title: Account Settings
account.quotaLoadError: Failed to load meeting notes quota: {error}
account.passwordFillAll: Please fill in all password fields

pair.title: Watch Pairing
pair.description: Get the pairing code from your watch, then complete device binding here. Uploads will be linked to your account.
pair.codeHint: e.g. 472918, press Enter after entering all 6 digits to bind
pair.errIncompleteCode: Please enter a complete 6-digit pairing code
pair.msgBindSuccess: Bound successfully. Device {deviceId} is now linked to your account.

tutorial.title: Quick Start Guide
tutorial.description: Follow these steps to complete device binding and upload verification.
tutorial.step1: Open Settings on your watch and get the 6-digit pairing code.
tutorial.step2: Go to "Bind Device" on the web, enter the pairing code to bind.
tutorial.step3: After binding, upload recordings from your watch. Files will appear on the home page.
tutorial.step4: If the session expires, get a new pairing code and bind again.

serviceConfig.title: AI Service Config
serviceConfig.description: Manage your config list on the left, view or edit details on the right. System defaults are used when no personal config is active.
serviceConfig.userConfigSubtitle: Create, edit, delete, and test personal configurations. Falls back to system defaults when disabled.

previewPackage.title: QR Code Install
previewPackage.subtitle: Select your device model
previewPackage.selectHint: Select a device model above to view the install QR code

notes.title: Smart Notes & Summary
notes.subtitle: The page renders either meeting notes or oral recording summaries based on the transcript.
notes.asrHint: Original transcription before model summarization. Copy directly.
notes.asrNoArchive: No ASR archive for this note
notes.asrEmpty: ASR text is empty, cannot copy
notes.asrClipboardUnsupported: Clipboard API not supported in this browser

settings.title: Meeting Notes Settings
settings.description: Manage API keys, LLM providers, models, prompts, and speech recognition parameters.
settings.adminSubtitle: Admin only. Manage system-wide default services. Supports multiple configs with active switching.
